vocab.example: I recently purchased a large floor mirror as a focal interior embellishment for my living room.

vocab.meaning: cạnh vát (được mài nghiêng để trang trí)
vocab.example: I chose a mirror with a bevelled edge because it adds a touch of sophistication and refracts light beautifully.
I enjoy scouring antique flea markets for vintage mirrors with ornate, gilded frames.

vocab.meaning: tạo ảo giác về không gian (làm căn phòng trông rộng hơn)
vocab.example: The primary reason I bought a wall-to-wall mirror was to create an illusion of space in my cramped apartment.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật/tăng cường ánh sáng tự nhiên
vocab.example: Strategically placing the mirror opposite the window helped accentuate the natural light in the hallway.
I prefer mirrors with thin metallic frames that align with the minimalist aesthetic of my home.

vocab.meaning: kính chống vỡ vụn (kính cường lực an toàn)
vocab.example: When shopping for a bathroom mirror, I prioritized shatter-proof glass for safety reasons.
An oversized sunburst mirror can serve as a stunning focal point in an otherwise plain dining area.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp/làm đẹp thêm cho đồ nội thất xung quanh
vocab.example: It took me weeks to find a vanity mirror that would perfectly complement the decor of my bedroom.

vocab.meaning: lớp phủ chống xỉn màu/ố mốc
vocab.example: I made sure the mirror I bought had a tarnish-resistant coating, as the humidity in the bathroom can be quite high.
